sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal, i.q. יָשַׁע-

(1) to be ample, broad; hence-

(2) to be rich, wealthy (see שֹׁועַ , שׁוּעַ No. 1 ).

(3) to be freed from danger and distress (compare יָשַׁע).

Piel שִׁוַּע to ask for aid, to implore help, Psa 18:42 Job 35:9 36:13 followed by אֶל Psa 30:3 88:14 72:12 .

Derivatives, שֶׁוַע-שַׁוְעָה.
